steps.screen:
[23CIt is written in the Book of Odin:

[27CAfter the Creation, the cruel god Moloch rebelled
[27Cagainst the authority of Marduk the Creator.
[27CMoloch stole from Marduk the most powerful of all
[27Cthe artifacts of the gods, the Amulet of Yendor,
[27Cand he hid it in the dark cavities of Gehennom, the
[27CUnder World, where he now lurks, and bides his time.

[23CYour god Odin seeks to possess the Amulet, and with it
[23Cto gain deserved ascendance over the other gods.

[23CYou, a newly trained Stripling, have been heralded
[23Cfrom birth as the instrument of Odin.  You are destined
[23Cto recover the Amulet for your deity, or die in the
[23Cattempt.  Your hour of destiny has come.  For the sake
[23Cof us all:  Go bravely with Odin!
[23C--More--

Wizard the Stripling[11CSt:18 Dx:11 Co:18 In:11 Wi:9 Ch:8 Neutral
Dlvl:1 $:0 HP:16(16) Pw:2(2) AC:6 Xp:1

engravings.text: I am NOT a vampire.  I just like to bite..nibble, really!
Anyone for deathmatch?
Couldn't I be sedated for this?
So then I says, How do I know you're the real angel of death?
So let it be written, so let it be done!
Funeral - Real fun.
Be prepared
Don't tread on me!
I'm not getting enough money, so I'm not going to engrave anything useful here.
I died laughing
Here lies the body of John Round.  Lost at sea and never found.
Game over, man.  Game over.
Virtually Alive
You set my heart aflame.  You gave me heartburn.
VACANCY
I can't go to hell, they don't want me.
Humpty Dumpty, a Bad Egg.  He was pushed off the wall.
He lost his face when he was beheaded.
I may rise but I refuse to shine.
I didn't believe in reincarnation the last time, either.
I know my mind.  And it's around here someplace.
Can you give me mouth to mouth, you just took my breath away.
